basic_details.job_title: ZP Nagpur Medical Officer (BAMS) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Zilla Parishad Nagpur (ZP Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Medical Officer (BAMS) posts! Published at the official website, nhm.zpnagpur.in, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants with a BAMS Degree, Registration Certificate, and related qualification documents can apply online up to 27-05-2026. Find all details about the ZP Nagpur Medical Officer (BAMS) new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: BAMS Degree, Additional Qualification Registration Certificate, Age proof, Experience Certificate.
qualification.details: BAMS Degree complete mark sheet (Only final year marks to be mentioned while filling online application) BAMS Degree BAMS Degree Registration Certificate Higher Educational Qualification Certificate Additional Qualification Registration Certificate Age proof certificate (TC/ Birth Certificate) Experience Certificate (Government/Semi-Government/State Govt. Under, such experience certificate will be considered if signed by the Head of Office (HOD) of the District Health Officer, District Surgeon, Medical Officer (M.N.P.A) and Semi-Government)

selection_process: Online application submission Original document verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ZP Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ZP Nagpur Medical Officer (BAMS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ZP Nagpur Medical Officer (BAMS) position is 27th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer (BAMS) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BAMS Degree, along with a Registration Certificate, Higher Educational Qualification Certificate, Additional Qualification Registration Certificate, and age proof.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer (BAMS) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer (BAMS) position in Zilla Parishad Nagpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer (BAMS) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Officer (BAMS) post will be as per government rules. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ZP Nagpur Medical Officer (BAMS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application submission followed by original document verification. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the Medical Officer (BAMS) application?
faq.answer: Required documents include BAMS Degree mark sheet, Degree certificate, Registration Certificate, Higher Educational Qualification Certificate, Additional Qualification Registration Certificate, and Age proof.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Medical Officer (BAMS) position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Medical Officer (BAMS) post is on a contract basis, offering temporary employment within Zilla Parishad Nagpur.
